title: 4 Outperforming Stocks in Buffett's Portfolio
text: As the first half of 2022 comes to a close, investors are cautiously approaching the remainder of the year as the economy continues to contend with high inflation and interest rates, rising oil prices, geopolitical tensions and supply chain disruptions.

title: 4 Stocks Warren Buffett Has Owned for at Least 21 Years
text: These highly profitable companies have been fixtures in Berkshire Hathaway's portfolio for more than two decades.
